mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, avatar, email, phone, gender, age, introduction, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM admin
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.username}, '%')
AND status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin ( username, password, nickname, avatar, email, phone, gender, age, introduction, status ) VALUES ( #{bean.username}, #{bean.password}, #{bean.nickname}, #{bean.avatar}, #{bean.email}, #{bean.phone}, #{bean.gender}, #{bean.age}, #{bean.introduction}, #{bean.status} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE password = VALUES(password), nickname = VALUES(nickname), avatar = VALUES(avatar), email = VALUES(email), phone = VALUES(phone), gender = VALUES(gender), age = VALUES(age), introduction = VALUES(introduction), status = VALUES(status)

INSERT INTO admin ( username, password, nickname, avatar, email, phone, gender, age, introduction, status ) VALUES
( #{bean.username}, #{bean.password}, #{bean.nickname}, #{bean.avatar}, #{bean.email}, #{bean.phone}, #{bean.gender}, #{bean.age}, #{bean.introduction}, #{bean.status} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE password = VALUES(password), nickname = VALUES(nickname), avatar = VALUES(avatar), email = VALUES(email), phone = VALUES(phone), gender = VALUES(gender), age = VALUES(age), introduction = VALUES(introduction), status = VALUES(status)
mapper.update:
UPDATE admin
password = #{bean.password},
nickname = #{bean.nickname},
avatar = #{bean.avatar},
email = #{bean.email},
phone = #{bean.phone},
gender = #{bean.gender},
age = #{bean.age},
introduction = #{bean.introduction},
status = #{bean.status},
WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE admin
password = #{bean.password},
nickname = #{bean.nickname},
avatar = #{bean.avatar},
email = #{bean.email},
phone = #{bean.phone},
gender = #{bean.gender},
age = #{bean.age},
introduction = #{bean.introduction},
status = #{bean.status},
WHERE username = #{username}
